summary: Created test coverage audit for IsaacLab. Analyzed 128 test files (~965 test functions) across 6 packages. Found that all tests require a live Isaac Sim GPU environment (no offline test tier). Critical gaps: `isaaclab.ui` has 0 tests, `isaaclab_tasks` (391 source files) has only 19 test functions, `isaaclab_mimic` has 6 test functions for 49 source files. CI runs two test jobs per PR on self-hosted GPU runners plus daily compatibility runs across Isaac Sim 4.5 and 5.0. Committed coverage/audit-2026-04-06.md and coverage/README.md.
